title: Pixel Breach 1.0.0 - New Cabinet
summary: Brand new Space Invaders-inspired shooter with 4 unique enemy types, 5 escalating waves, laser combo system, and golden shield pickups.

title: Neon Meteor Run 1.4.0 - Visual Overhaul
summary: Particle explosion system, screen shake on collision, animated comet trails, engine glow, and premium CRT HUD elements are all live.

title: Skyline Sprint GX 1.1.0 - Visual Pass
summary: Rain effect with wet road sheen, animated city antennas with blinking lights, boost jet trails, and particle crash effects added.

title: Memory Vault 84 1.1.0 - Enhanced Glyphs
summary: Per-glyph color palette with distinct glows, flip animation, circuit-board tile backgrounds, and best-run notification added.
